    ApiErrorResponse

    Handles AccountBlockedException (HTTP 422).
    ApiErrorResponse

    Handles AccountNotFoundException (HTTP 404).
    ApiErrorResponse
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleDuplicateTransaction(DuplicateTransactionException ex, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Handles DuplicateTransactionException (HTTP 409).
    ApiErrorResponse
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleInsufficientFunds(InsufficientFundsException ex, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)

    ApiErrorResponse
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleOptimisticLock(OptimisticLockingFailureException ex, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Handles OptimisticLockingFailureException (HTTP 409).
    ApiErrorResponse
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleUnexpected(Exception ex, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Catch-all handler for unexpected exceptions (HTTP 500).
    ApiErrorResponse
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleValidation(MethodArgumentNotValidException ex, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Handles MethodArgumentNotValidException (HTTP 400).
